title: VISTA GARDENS Reviews - Seattle, WA | Angi
content: Vista did a great job. We wanted everything to be pruned and trimmed organically rather than geometrically and they did the entire yard in a day.

title: ESSENTIAL GARDENERS - Updated June 2026 - 24 Reviews - Yelp
content: We've been using Essential Gardeners for several years now, and their work is amazing. We have a very highly visible front yard/hill, and get comments

title: Let's Go: Vista Gardens
content: Pretty much perfection. Those views! Not only the water and land beyond, but the garden below and all around offer such diversity of form, color

title: Plan Your Visit to Vista Gardens | Tours, Events & Workshops
content: Our guided tours provide an in-depth look at each of our 15 integrated garden areas, from the towering Redwood Sanctuary to the serene paths of the Stroll

title: The 10 Best Gardening Services in Seattle, WA (with Free Estimates)
content: Great service and professional. Our garden looks the best it's looked in a long time! We'll use them again for our landscaping needs.
